favoriteThing: Playing the game Dead by Daylight
subtitle: A personalized birthday celebration.
bigline: Maybe something wonderful will happen here.

welcome.title: Welcome
paragraphs: Welcome to your personalized Birthday Slots celebration.
You have five official spins waiting for you.
Your dad Mike created this celebration especially for you.
welcome.overrideLine: Brett has opened the official celebration review.

scoreboard.title: Birthday Scoreboard
scoreboard.note: Every official spin is a win.

rules: Every official spin is a win.
Any prizes or cash gifts are supplied by Mike, not Playable Greetings.
Share your final celebration with Mike.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Birthday Result
finale.note: Your top cash win is $100, provided by Mike in person. Brett has stamped the celebration APPROVED.

footer: Made with care by Mike for Chris

claim.template: Any prizes or cash gifts are supplied by Mike.

auditor.name: Brett
lines: Brett is inspecting the celebration paperwork.
Brett is checking subsection 14B of the Celebration Manual.

officialSpins.message: Your birthday celebration begins now. Enjoy every official spin.

officialSpins.message: Mike hopes today brings plenty of smiles and some time for Dead by Daylight.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Brett is inspecting the celebration paperwork.

officialSpins.title: Made For You
officialSpins.message: Your dad Mike chose to celebrate your birthday by creating something just for you.

officialSpins.title: A Quiet Moment
officialSpins.message: Take a moment to enjoy knowing someone cared enough to create this celebration for you.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Brett is checking subsection 14B of the Celebration Manual.

bonusNoCash.message: The celebration continues with another reason to smile.

bonusNoCash.title: Lasting Joy
bonusNoCash.message: The final win is a birthday moment created with care and meant to be remembered.

bonusCash.message: You won $20 from Mike. Maybe it can go toward something connected with Dead by Daylight.
